title: potentilla norvegica subsp. hirsuta
intro: Potentilla norvegica subsp. hirsuta is a subspecies of the Potentilla norvegica plant, a perennial herb native to Northern Europe, known for its hairy stems and leaves. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, as it contains tannins and other bioactive compounds that have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Potentilla norvegica subsp. hirsuta include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including diarrhea and irritable bowel syndrome.
